proj.thebeebaby.overviewDesc: Thebeebaby is a beautifully crafted e-commerce and catalog web application designed to provide a seamless shopping experience. It features a custom dashboard for administrative control and a secure authentication portal for users.
proj.thebeebaby.obj1: Deliver a high-quality, visually appealing catalog.
proj.thebeebaby.obj2: Implement a robust user login and authentication flow.
proj.thebeebaby.obj3: Develop an intuitive dashboard for managing products and orders.
proj.thebeebaby.mockupsDesc: Here is an in-depth look at the various platforms and interfaces developed for Thebeebaby, including the hero page, the catalog, the user login portal, and the administrative dashboard.
proj.thebeebaby.techDesc: The frontend architecture prioritizes component reusability and fast load times. We utilized modern CSS grids for the catalog layout to ensure responsiveness across all devices.
proj.thebeebaby.techSubDesc: Secure token-based authentication was implemented to protect user routes and the dashboard.
proj.thebeebaby.resultsDesc: The launch of Thebeebaby resulted in a highly engaging platform that perfectly captures the brand's aesthetic while providing all the necessary e-commerce tools.
proj.thebeebaby.res1: Achieved a 100% modern, fully responsive interface.
proj.thebeebaby.res2: Integrated a fully operational dashboard for business management.
proj.dahuss.overviewDesc: Dahuss is a modern administrative platform designed to manage robust user profiles and administrative settings. The focus was heavily on a clean, scalable interface design and a secure authentication flow.
proj.dahuss.obj1: Build a highly secure, multi-role login system.
proj.dahuss.obj2: Develop an intuitive administrative panel for managing data.
proj.dahuss.obj3: Ensure a consistent, clean design language across all screens.
proj.dahuss.mockupsDesc: Here is an in-depth look at the various platform interfaces developed for Dahuss, including the homepage, body content, login portal, and the dual administrative dashboard views.
proj.dahuss.techDesc: For Dahuss, the state management required a solid architecture to handle complex administrative rules seamlessly without compromising performance.
proj.dahuss.techSubDesc: We implemented dynamic rendering based on the user's role to securely guard the administrative routes directly on the client side, paired with robust backend checks.
proj.dahuss.resultsDesc: Dahuss successfully met all requirements, deploying a powerful yet easy-to-navigate administrative system.
proj.dahuss.res1: Security: Zero vulnerabilities reported in the role-based system.
proj.dahuss.res2: Usability: Reduced admin task completion time due to the streamlined UI.
proj.retorica.overviewDesc: Retorica is a high-performance landing page developed in Astro, built to showcase services and engage users through an immersive interface. The project aimed to deliver a visually striking experience while maintaining excellent performance and usability.
proj.retorica.obj1: Create an engaging, highly visual landing experience.
proj.retorica.obj2: Design clear, accessible service presentation pages.
proj.retorica.obj3: Implement interactive forms for user engagement.
proj.retorica.mockupsDesc: Below is a visual walkthrough of the platform, including the main hero view, service details, interactive universe section, and user forms.
proj.retorica.techDesc: The frontend was structured to allow smooth transitions between sections and handle dynamic content loading seamlessly.
proj.retorica.techSubDesc: Forms were built with real-time validation and asynchronous submission logic to ensure a frictionless user experience.
proj.retorica.resultsDesc: The platform successfully integrated a unique visual identity with solid technical foundations.
proj.retorica.res1: Engagement: Enhanced user interaction times with the immersive 'Universo' section.
proj.retorica.res2: Reliability: Robust form handling increasing successful lead conversions.
proj.floreria.overviewDesc: Floreria El Nuevo Pensamiento is an elegant e-commerce platform built to seamlessly connect customers with beautiful floral arrangements. The goal was to provide a fresh, inviting digital storefront with a smooth purchasing flow.
proj.floreria.obj1: Design a clean, visually appealing storefront.
proj.floreria.obj2: Implement an intuitive product catalog and cart system.
proj.floreria.obj3: Ensure a fully responsive and mobile-friendly shopping experience.
proj.floreria.mockupsDesc: Here is an in-depth look at the various views developed for the florist platform, highlighting the beautiful imagery and clean layout.
proj.floreria.techDesc: The application leverages a component-based architecture for managing dynamic product listings and shopping cart state efficiently.
proj.floreria.techSubDesc: Global state management was implemented to ensure the shopping cart remains synchronized across the entire platform.
proj.floreria.resultsDesc: The final platform perfectly captured the brand's essence and provided a modern, secure, and fast shopping experience for its customers.
proj.floreria.res1: Usability: Increased customer retention due to a streamlined checkout process.
proj.floreria.res2: Design: A fresh and elegant aesthetic that highlights the floral products.
about.bio: I'm Andrés Irigoyen, a full-stack developer specialized in transforming traditional businesses into digital powerhouses. With experience building e-commerce, admin platforms, and high-converting landings, my goal is to deliver code that directly increases your sales and reduces operational costs.
testimonials.title: What my clients say
testimonials.1.text: Andrés delivered the e-commerce in record time. Sales increased by 30% in the first month thanks to the new checkout.
testimonials.1.author: María López, CEO - Thebeebaby
testimonials.2.text: We needed a secure and fast admin dashboard. The result exceeded our expectations, cutting our management time in half.
testimonials.2.author: Carlos Ramírez, Operations - Dahuss
